title: tolerance_budget_state
description: Phase 3 — per-source variance-budget state moved out of the contracts file. One file per source under `data-lake/store/processed/meetings/<source_id>/diagnostics/tolerance_budget_state__<source_id>.json`. Never promoted, never indexed. The budget module reads the file; the production extraction's post-comparison hook writes it. A missing or malformed file does not block the run — the reader falls back to `global_median_budget` from the contracts file.

runs_observed.description: Count of non-legacy, non-tainted comparison artifacts observed for this source. Drives the kick-in threshold for the per-source variance budget (`PER_SOURCE_RUN_THRESHOLD` runs).

f1_variance_budget.description: Variance budget for this source, recomputed from the most recent N comparison F1 values. Below `PER_SOURCE_RUN_THRESHOLD` runs the budget module ignores this value and returns `global_median_budget` from the contracts file instead.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the state entry was last refreshed.

last_comparison_artifact_path.description: Path of the most recent comparison_result the hook ingested. Used by the idempotency check: if a re-run presents the same path, `runs_observed` is not incremented.
